title: Craftable Nametags
description: Adds a simple recipe: 1 paper + 1 string = 1 name tag, making name tags easy to get in survival without villagers or fishing. Simple, vanilla-friendly QoL change.
body:
[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/Y8Y1138BQD)

This datapack adds a simple and convenient way to craft name tags using 1 paper and 1 string, making them accessible early in survival. It removes the reliance on fishing or villager trading while keeping things balanced and vanilla-friendly. Perfect for singleplayer worlds and SMPs that want an easy QoL improvement without changing core gameplay.


![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/808c62bc03da8baa60629d1c3228f36223fdc0b2.png)
